description: If cool is your middle name, this black duffel bag belongs in your collection. Perfect for gymming sessions or weekend getaways, carry this along wherever you go and flaunt your trendy style statement. Made of nylon for enhanced durability Large and roomy main compartment with a small mesh zippered pocket for stowing away essentials Two short handles and a detachable shoulder strap Zippered pockets on all four sides Brand name and logo embroidered on the front Nylon bonded thread for long life CareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
